name: anchor
description: anchor — engineering-discipline pack for Claude Code & Codex CLI. Single-plugin marketplace so users can install anchor without waiting for Anthropic's directory.

plugins.name: anchor
plugins.description: Engineering discipline pack: skill + 11 slash commands + 4 safety hooks. Keeps AI on-task on long tasks (TaskCreate-anchored scope, anti-drift braking, optional autonomous mode that blocks 'stop' until tasks complete), enforces end-to-end verification + multi-pass vulnerability scanning + condition-based codex review + project-CLAUDE.md pitfall writeback, and blocks irreversible bash commands via PreToolUse hook. Cross-CLI by design.
